title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Performance Since Launch
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 2.44% in July, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.77%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.72%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 2.75% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: S&P Gains and Losses Today: Bank Stocks Tumble on Moody's Downgrade
text: The S&P 500 dipped 0.4% on Tuesday, Aug. 8, 2023, as bank stocks lost ground after Moody's downgrades.

title: Expeditors International of Washington: An Undervalued Gem in the Transportation Industry?
text: Despite a daily loss of 3.85% and a modest 3-month gain of 3.7%, the Earnings Per Share (EPS) (EPS) of Expeditors International of Washington Inc ( EXPD , Financial) stands strong at 7.64. This article aims to answer a crucial question: Is the stock modestly undervalued?

title: Expeditors (EXPD) Stock Down on Q2 Earnings & Revenue Miss
text: Expeditors (EXPD) stock declines due to dismal second-quarter performance. Airfreight tonnage and ocean container volumes decrease 15% and 13%, respectively, on a year-over-year basis.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for Expeditors International (EXPD) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.30 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.34 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.27 per share a year ago.

title: Expeditors Reports Second Quarter 2023 EPS of $1.30
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. title: What's in the Cards for Expeditors (EXPD) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Lackluster revenues and volumes are likely to have affected Expeditors' (EXPD) performance in Q2.
